name: Chilled Black Olive Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Either slice the olives wafer-thin or chop them into bits in a food processor.
2. Place chicken broth in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Add onions and garlic. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Remove pan from heat, strain out onion and garlic bits (discard), and return soup to the pan.
5. Add olives.
6. Beat egg in a bowl. Slowly add a cup of hot soup while continuing to beat, taking care not to curdle the egg. Pour soup/egg mixture back into the pot.
7. Add light cream, steak sauce, and sherry.
8. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
9. Serve chilled in chilled soup bowls.
